component.name: ImgConvert HEIC Import Extension
component.summary: Optional decode-only HEIC/HEIF import helper for ImgConvert

description.p: Adds optional HEIC/HEIF import through a process-isolated helper. The main ImgConvert Flatpak does not bundle this codec and does not provide HEIC output.
This extension builds libheif with libde265 for HEVC decoding. HEIC encoding, x265, and other GPL-only codec paths are intentionally disabled.
